questionHtml: Using information from Table 1, calculate the unemployment rate for Bangladesh in 2019.
markschemeHtml:
Unemployment Rate =2.9670.1×100 [1]

                                 = 4.22 % OR 0.04 [1]

An answer of 4.22% or 0.04 without working is sufficient for [1].

For full marks to be awarded, the response must provide valid working and include correct units.

meta.title: Using information from Table 1, calculate the unemployment rate for Bangladesh in 2019.
